## User need

Who needs the feature and why?

## Proposed outcome

What result should the system provide?

## Requirements

List the requirements for this feature.

## Nonrequirements

State what is outside the scope of this request.

## Security and privacy

Identify relevant security and privacy concerns.

## Accessibility

Identify relevant accessibility needs.

## Acceptance criteria

List measurable completion conditions.
